Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Enhancement

## Related issues

Fixes # (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with zero issues
- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] Tests added for new logic (where applicable)
- [ ] UI changes verified on all applicable platforms (Windows / Android Phone / Android TV)
- [ ] Read `PRODUCT.md` and `DESIGN.md` before any UI work
- [ ] PR is focused — one feature or fix per PR

## Notes for reviewer

Anything the reviewer should pay attention to.
